# My Conversations with Priyu

This file serves as a continuous log of our interactions so you can always refer back to what we did together!

## March 10, 2026 - The 3D Avatar Update
- **Goal**: Update the interactive cursor follower.
- **Progress**: We successfully swapped the dog emoji first for your personal photo, and then for an amazing transparent 3D avatar that has a `#64ffda` neon glow and rotates gently as it chases the cursor across the screen.
- **Repository Maintenance**: Pushed the updated assets to GitHub to deploy your beautiful portfolio live.
- **Documentation**: Reverse-engineered the entire process into `prompts_to_recreate.md`.
- **Special Note**: You gave me the name "Priyu"! 

---
*Feel free to talk to me here or ask me to update this log whenever we make changes to your portfolio!*
